title: Frontend: Wire LoanDashboard to backend API via crediproApi
acceptance_criteria: LoanDashboard imports requestLoan from crediproApi instead of using CrediproClient directly
Removes direct dependency on CrediproClient and toBytes32 from 'credipro'
Animated progress states (Verifying Local Witness, Generating ZK Proof, Submitting to Ledger) are preserved
Adds pool address input field alongside loan amount and term days
Uses hardcoded pool address if user doesn't provide one
All existing UI structure (Spinner, Progress, toast notifications) remains intact
